summary: Applied ADR 0285 from source commit `779a8cab0c21ebac878104ee9ee373949a447d12` on top of the latest `origin/main` baseline `0.177.115 / 0.130.75`. The branch-local replay left Paperless live at `paperless.lv3.org`, kept the `docker-runtime-lv3` stack healthy, restored the correct edge certificate after transient drift on the shared NGINX surface, and repaired the smoke-upload verifier so repeated public checks no longer fail Paperless duplicate detection against trashed prior probes.

verification.observed: The branch-local regression bundle preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0285-targeted-pytest-r1.txt` passed with `76 passed in 7.06s`, and the post-fix `uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_paperless_sync.py` rerun passed with `7 passed in 0.07s`.
`python3 scripts/validate_service_completeness.py --service paperless`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards health-probes`, and `git diff --check` all passed on the settled branch-local tree.

The guest probe preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0285-guest-runtime-r3.txt` confirmed `paperless`, `paperless-openbao-agent`, and `paperless-redis` were healthy and that the authenticated local documents API returned a clean JSON listing.

verification.check: Public Paperless TLS and taxonomy verification
verification.observed: The public probe preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0285-public-head-r2.txt` returned the correct `paperless.lv3.org` certificate plus `HTTP/2 302`, and the verify report preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0285-public-verify-r3.txt` confirmed no taxonomy drift through `https://paperless.lv3.org/api/`.

verification.check: Public smoke upload and task completion
verification.observed: The smoke run preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0285-public-smoke-r3.txt` created temporary document `2` from task `7e0fb57a-2fe7-421d-bd71-3edf81069c87` and cleaned it up successfully, while the task ledger preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0285-task-log-r1.json` shows the corresponding `consume_file` task completed with `SUCCESS`.

notes: This branch-local receipt deliberately stops before the protected main integration surfaces are rewritten. `README.md`, `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, and `versions/stack.yaml` still await the exact-main integration step.

The replay exposed one repo defect that is fixed in source commit `779a8cab0c21ebac878104ee9ee373949a447d12`: the old smoke-upload verifier generated constant PDF bytes, which Paperless later rejected as duplicates after earlier probes were deleted into the trash.
